caption: A man with short, dark hair and stubble is recorded in a studio setting against a wall of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a black button-down shirt over a grey t-shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black shock mount and boom arm. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, his facial expressions shifting from a focused look with wide eyes to a more relaxed state with partially closed eyelids. His right hand is visible, gesturing in the air to emphasize his points, moving from a slightly raised position towards the center of the frame. The lighting is consistent throughout, focusing on the man as he engages in a recording session.
